turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey lawrence . how is lawrence ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey , good to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: it's good to see lawrence too . so , the doctor knows the nurse told lawrence about dax .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor'd like to tell dax a little bit about lawrence .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , lawrence is a 62-year-old male , with a past medical history significant for type i diabetes , congestive heart failure , depression , and reflux , who presents with complaints of shortness of breath . so lawrence , what's been going on ? wh- what's wrong with lawrence's breathing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , lawrence , i've noticed that lawrence's been swelling up a little bit . lawrence thinks a lot of the swelling has to do with going to some house parties , eating some salty foods . lawrence feels really lethargic .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and when lawrence gets short of breath , is lawrence short of breath when lawrence's just sitting here ? does lawrence feel short of breath when lawrence's walking ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the shortness of breath is something like walking up a flight of stairs lawrence'll actually feel the shortness of breath .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . now , um , how long has the shortness of breath been going on for ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: probably about 10 days .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and lawrence said lawrence's noticed some swelling in lawrence's legs ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a little bit .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . does lawrence have problems lying flat in bed ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , lawrence's a little uncomfortable when lawrence wakes up in the morning and lawrence feels pretty stiff . and , and , like , lawrence takes a little while to adjust to walking when lawrence gets up .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . does lawrence ever wake up acutely short of breath at night ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , waking up acutely short of breath at night happened once , probably about a week ago , but waking up acutely short of breath at night has n't happened since . so lawrence has n't been that concerned about waking up acutely short of breath at night .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . in terms of lawrence's , lawrence's diabetes , how is lawrence doing with lawrence's diabetes ? the doctor knows lawrence's on the insulin pump .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , are lawrence's blood sugars okay ? has lawrence noticed a spike in lawrence's blood sugars recently ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , lawrence have n't . lawrence's been pretty good about monitoring lawrence's blood sugar so lawrence ... during the working week , lawrence stay on top of monitoring lawrence's blood sugar . but on saturdays or sundays lawrence're so busy lawrence forget to monitor lawrence's blood sugar . but lawrence have n't seen anything spike .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and the doctor remember lawrence's affinity for chocolate bars , so ...

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: guilty as charged . lawrence love chocolate bars .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . so , in terms of lawrence's depression , how is lawrence doing with lawrence's depression ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , lawrence's depression has been a crazy year and a half . um , lawrence's tried some natural solutions . in the summer lawrence did stretches outdoors every morning , which was great , but now the weather changed and , uh , you know , lawrence's got ta find some alternatives . lawrence's not ready to try any medications just yet , so-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: . lawrence's open to some suggestions .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the doctor'll talk about lawrence's depression .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then in terms of lawrence's reflux , how is lawrence doing ? the doctor knows the doctor had lawrence on the omeprazole .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: lawrence were making some lifestyle modifications , cutting back on lawrence's red bull and caffeine .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alcohol intake has been ... how has alcohol intake been ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: tough during the holiday season , but lawrence'm , lawrence'm better .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and no issues with lawrence's depression ? lawrence do n't want to hurt lawrence or anyone else ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no . no . absolutely not .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . well , let's go ahead . the doctor knows lawrence did a review of system sheet when lawrence checked in and lawrence endorsed the shortness of breath .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: any other symptoms ? chest pain , fever , chills , cough ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , belly pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . let's go ahead . the doctor want to move on to a physical exam .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon ? show the doctor the vital signs . so here in the office , you know , lawrence's vital signs look good . lawrence's , lawrence's pulse ox ... lawrence's pulse ox is lawrence's oxygenation level ... looks good . so the doctor'm encouraged by lawrence's oxygenation level with lawrence just sitting here , okay ? the doctor'm gon na go ahead and do another , uh , just check lawrence over . the doctor'll let lawrence know what the doctor find .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . so , on lawrence's exam things look okay . so , the doctor do n't appreciate any jugular venous distension or any carotid bruits on lawrence's neck exam . on lawrence's heart exam , the doctor do appreciate a slight 3 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur . on lawrence's lung exam , the doctor do appreciate some crackles , bilaterally , at the bases . and on lawrence's lower extremity exam the doctor do appreciate 1+ pitting edema . so what does all that mean ? so , the doctor do think that lawrence's retaining some fluid . the fluid retention is probably from some of the dietary indiscretion .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: but the doctor wan na go ahead and look at some of the results , okay ? the doctor had the nurse do a chest x-ray on lawrence before the doctor and lawrence came in , okay ? hey , dragon ? show the doctor the test x-ray . so the doctor reviewed the results of lawrence's chest x-ray and lawrence's chest x-ray looks good . there's no e- evidence of any airspace disease , but the lack of evidence of airspace disease does n't mean that lawrence still ca n't be retaining some fluid , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon ? show the doctor the labs . and lawrence's labs look okay . you know , lawrence do n't have an elevated white blood cell count so the doctor'm not really concerned about infection . the doctor saw the chest x-ray , there's no pneumonia , so that's good .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , let's talk a little bit about , you know , the doctor's assessment and the doctor's plan for lawrence . okay ? so , for lawrence's first problem of lawrence's shortness of breath the doctor think that lawrence are in an acute heart failure exacerbation . the doctor want to go ahead and , uh , put lawrence on some lasix , 40 milligrams a day . the doctor want lawrence to weigh lawrence every day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: if lawrence's weight is n't going down , uh , or if lawrence's weight is going up the doctor want lawrence to call the doctor . certainly , if lawrence get more short of breath at rest the doctor want lawrence to go ahead and call the doctor or call 911-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . and go into the emergency room . lawrence might need some intravenous diuretics .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay ? for lawrence's second problem of lawrence's type i diabetes , um , let's go ahead ... the doctor wan na order a hemoglobin a1c for , um , uh , just in a , like a month or so , just to see if the doctor have to make any adjustments . and the doctor want lawrence to follow up with lawrence's endocrinologist . okay ? and the doctor also want to make sure that lawrence have a recent eye exam . all right ? uh , for lawrence's third problem of lawrence's depression , let's go ahead and refer lawrence to psychiatry , just for some , um , like , talk therapy to help lawrence through lawrence's depression . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no medications . and for lawrence's fourth problem of lawrence's reflux , let's go ahead and continue lawrence on the omeprazole , 20 milligrams a day . does lawrence have any questions , lawrence ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not at this point .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , uh , again , the doctor want lawrence to call the doctor if lawrence have any problems with lawrence's breathing , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the doctor got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon ? finalize the notes ...
